subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath made mention, and continueth to make mention, of His servants and handmaidens, and remembereth them all in this luminous Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی عباد و اماء خود را ذکر نموده و مینماید و جمیع را در این یوم نورانی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @words vs deeds, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
